name: Butterfly Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut each won ton wrapper into 2 rectangles.
2. Lay one rectangle on top of the other to form a double thickness.
3. Make three ½-inch slits in the center, lengthwise.
4. To form a bow, pull one end through the middle slit.
5. Deep fry butterflies until golden, about 1 minute or less.
6. Drain on paper towels.
7. Sift powdered sugar over both sides.
8. Cool.
Yield: About 80
DO-AHEAD NOTES: These keep several weeks in air-tight containers.
